title: webtrigger onClick
text: webtrigger onClick This trigger is used to program behavior when the user clicks on DSP widget. Declaration: Explain this code webtriggeronClick Optional scope block Optional variables block javascript Javascript to implement the client-side trigger endjavascript end Copy - or - Explain this code triggeronClick public web Optional scope block Optional variables block Proc code to implement a server-side trigger end Copy Parameters: None Applies to: DSP widgets: genericHTML ( AttributesOnly ) Activation: Activated when the user clicks on DSP widget. Default behavior: None Behavior upon completion: None Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
